name: Galleon
description: Big triangular sails leaning into the wind, swapping inks and tack as they turn.

code.style: --rule: ( --tri: @p(polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%), polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 0 100%), polygon(0 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%), polygon(100% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%)); margin: -0.5px; @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: @var(--tri); clip-path: @var(--tri); } -webkit-transition: ease 500ms; transition: ease 500ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
